chapter_context.summary: Provisions to ensure that tribal inheritance remains intact, particularly regarding female heirs.

outline.text: Request of the Leaders of Gilead
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Request of the Leaders of Gilead (36:1-4), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.

outline.text: The Marriage of the Daughters of Zelophehad
outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Marriage of the Daughters of Zelophehad (36:5-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.

key_themes.title: God's Faithfulness
key_themes.description: God sustaining His people despite their repeated rebellions.

key_themes.title: The Census
key_themes.description: The organization and numbering of the new generation.

devotional.question: How can we learn from Israel's mistakes and choose trust over complaining?
In what ways has God 'cloud and fire' guided your path recently?

cultural_historical.title: The Wilderness Journey
cultural_historical.text: The journey from Sinai to Moab was meant to be brief but became a 40-year period of purification for the nation.
